description: CompositionBlack striped shirt, made of 25% cotton, 40% polyester, 4% spandex and 31% nylon, has a full length buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, one pocket on the left chest and a curved hem FitSlimWash careHand or machine wash cold with mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironscullers brings a dash of style to your look with this party shirt. Be the cynosure of all eyes while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants or denims for a stylish semi-formal or party look. Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
